items.name: breath-cycle
items.description: Inhale → hold → exhale. Auto-breathe at 50%/70%/85%. Commands: /exhale, /breathe, /rest, /inhale.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Inhale → hold → exhale. Auto-breathe at 50%/70%/85%. Commands: /exhale, /breathe, /rest, /inhale.

items.name: community-safe
items.description: Community/public content must never contain private data. The channel-guard script catches leaks pre-push. This protocol covers the judgment — what to keep private, where it belongs.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Community/public content must never contain private data. The channel-guard script catches leaks pre-push. This protocol covers the judgment — what to keep private, where it belongs.

items.name: correction-capture
items.description: When corrected, acknowledge without justifying, log old→new pattern, write a muscle if repeated. Third correction on same thing → escalate to protocol or identity.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: When corrected, acknowledge without justifying, log old→new pattern, write a muscle if repeated. Third correction on same thing → escalate to protocol or identity.

items.name: detection-triggers
items.description: Capture on corrections, preferences, 3+ patterns, knowledge gaps. Bubble-up: log → muscle → protocol → core.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Capture on corrections, preferences, 3+ patterns, knowledge gaps. Bubble-up: log → muscle → protocol → core.

items.name: frontmatter-standard
items.description: Every .md file needs frontmatter: type, status, created, updated. Protocols get TL;DR; muscles get digest.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Every .md file needs frontmatter: type, status, created, updated. Protocols get TL;DR; muscles get digest.

items.name: git-identity
items.description: Commits must be attributed correctly. Check git config user.email before first commit in any repo. Define identity zones (personal, business, agent) and enforce them.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Commits must be attributed correctly. Check git config user.email before first commit in any repo. Define identity zones (personal, business, agent) and enforce them.

items.name: heat-tracking
items.description: Soma loads protocols and muscles by temperature: cold (skip), warm (breadcrumb), hot (full). Heat auto-adjusts from usage patterns and decays when idle. /pin and /kill for manual control.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Soma loads protocols and muscles by temperature: cold (skip), warm (breadcrumb), hot (full). Heat auto-adjusts from usage patterns and decays when idle. /pin and /kill for manual control.

items.name: pattern-evolution
items.description: Skills → Muscles → Protocols → Automations. Born from gaps and friction. Not every pattern climbs the full ladder.
items.author: Curtis Mercier
items.breadcrumb: Skills → Muscles → Protocols → Automations. Born from gaps and friction. Not every pattern climbs the full ladder.

items.name: pre-flight
items.description: Before building anything: check if it exists. Before accepting a request: verify it's needed. Grep for prior art. Catch user mistakes before executing them.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Before building anything: check if it exists. Before accepting a request: verify it's needed. Grep for prior art. Catch user mistakes before executing them.

items.name: quality-standards
items.description: Deletion is irreversible — move or archive. Protect critical files. Clean commits with descriptive messages. Know which branch deploys. Atomic commits — one concern each.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Deletion is irreversible — move or archive. Protect critical files. Clean commits with descriptive messages. Know which branch deploys. Atomic commits — one concern each.

items.name: session-checkpoints
items.description: Soma can auto-commit .soma/ state on every exhale and surface git diffs on boot. Two tracks: .soma/ internal git (never pushed) and project code (squash before push).
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Soma can auto-commit .soma/ state on every exhale and surface git diffs on boot. Two tracks: .soma/ internal git (never pushed) and project code (squash before push).

items.name: task-tracking
items.description: One board: .soma/_kanban.md. Move cards in real time. Verify on exhale.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: One board: .soma/_kanban.md. Move cards in real time. Verify on exhale.

items.name: tool-discipline
items.description: Read before edit. grep/find for exploration. Edit for surgical changes. The guard extension blocks dangerous bash commands based on your guard settings.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Read before edit. grep/find for exploration. Edit for surgical changes. The guard extension blocks dangerous bash commands based on your guard settings.

items.name: workflow
items.description: Test before commit, commit before moving on, push before walking away. Know your deploy branch. Unpushed work is invisible — treat it as unfinished.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Test before commit, commit before moving on, push before walking away. Know your deploy branch. Unpushed work is invisible — treat it as unfinished.

items.name: working-style
items.description: Be direct. Lead with action. Know your tools. Understand before you change, verify after you build. Plans live in files, not context.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Be direct. Lead with action. Know your tools. Understand before you change, verify after you build. Plans live in files, not context.

items.name: doc-hygiene
items.description: Plans rot — update remaining on every touch. Stale docs poison future sessions. After shipping, scan for overlapping/outdated docs and archive or update.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Plans rot — update remaining on every touch. Stale docs poison future sessions. After shipping, scan for overlapping/outdated docs and archive or update.

items.name: icon-audit
items.description: Browse icon libraries, extract SVGs, build numbered comparison pages, and screenshot for visual AI review.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Browse icon libraries, extract SVGs, build numbered comparison pages, and screenshot for visual AI review.

items.name: incremental-refactor
items.description: Never refactor blind. Scan deps first, plan changes, execute one file at a time, keep old paths working during transition, verify after each step.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Never refactor blind. Scan deps first, plan changes, execute one file at a time, keep old paths working during transition, verify after each step.

items.name: micro-exhale
items.description: Write workflow summaries to daily log after major completions — one file per day, always append.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Write workflow summaries to daily log after major completions — one file per day, always append.

items.name: precision-edit
items.description: Before editing: grep -n to locate, read --offset to see exact whitespace, plan edits as a checklist, then execute. Never edit blind.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Before editing: grep -n to locate, read --offset to see exact whitespace, plan edits as a checklist, then execute. Never edit blind.

items.name: safe-file-ops
items.description: Check before write, never delete without backup, scope your searches, check for existing content before creating.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Check before write, never delete without backup, scope your searches, check for existing content before creating.

items.name: task-tooling
items.description: Before starting any task, map which scripts, muscles, and tools apply. Name the tool for each phase. When a gap exists, say so explicitly.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Before starting any task, map which scripts, muscles, and tools apply. Name the tool for each phase. When a gap exists, say so explicitly.

items.name: test-hygiene
items.description: Validate tests aren't stale after any code removal, rename, or restructure. Run all suites, grep for orphaned references, check pass counts. Dead tests are worse than no tests.
items.author: meetsoma
items.breadcrumb: Validate tests aren't stale after any code removal, rename, or restructure. Run all suites, grep for orphaned references, check pass counts. Dead tests are worse than no tests.

items.name: architect
items.description: Structure-focused agent for engineering teams — code review, standards enforcement, verification-first workflow
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: core
items.description: Default Soma setup — breath cycle, heat tracking, learning protocols, and clean memory structure. What every agent starts with.
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: devops
items.description: Ops-focused agent for deployment, CI/CD, and infrastructure — verify before deploy, maintain tooling, automate everything
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: fullstack
items.description: Daily driver for web and app development — precision editing, safe operations, task awareness, doc hygiene, test discipline
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: maintainer
items.description: Codebase steward — test hygiene, doc maintenance, dependency health, technical debt tracking
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: refactorer
items.description: Migration and refactoring specialist — scan before touching, one file at a time, backward-compatible transitions, verify at every step
items.author: meetsoma

items.name: writer
items.description: Writing-focused agent for technical content, blogging, and documentation — accuracy first, honest voice, learns your style
items.author: meetsoma
